productDisplayName: Levis Kids Girl's Alicia Pink Kidswear
description: CompositionPink capris in woven cotton with a soft elastic waist band, soft stretchable fabric gathered at the calves, two side pockets, two back pockets, strong belt loops, branded zipper with Levi's buttons and brand tag stitched to the right hipFitting Regular 56 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed Use mild detergent Dry cleaning possible Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Those pants that will make your young girl look like a rock star are finally here. With a wide elastic at the waist and made of soft fabric, your little princess will feel all light and happy in these bottoms. Pair it with a cotton top and a pair of crocs footwear, and there your little girl goes like a doll!
